expected: `Compute` is the OWN-role action that derives a new immutable value from existing data. It takes a source and an operation: arithmetic (`+`, `-`, `*`, `/`, `%`), a qualifier (`length`, `uppercase`, `lowercase`, `hash`, `sort`, `reverse`, `union`, `intersect`, `difference`), or string concat (`++`). Result is bound to the angle-bracketed name on the left.
